items.title: Amazon and Chewy just got a major vote of confidence: Here’s why
items.description: Online shopping isn't just coming back; it's growing smarter, quicker, and more customized. After years of changing consumer patterns thanks to the aftermath of Covid, global eCommerce is ready to make a big comeback in 2026. A recent report suggests that online sales will grow by 10% per year, ...

items.title: Bitfarms Massive AI Fundraise Puts It on the IREN, Hut 8 Path
items.description: Bitfarms Ltd. (NASDAQ:BITF) is moving beyond Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mining into the fast-growing sector of high-performance computing (HPC) and AI datacenters. Last week, the company announced a $500 million convertible notes offering to finance the ...

items.title: A Big $40 Billion Bet In AI
items.description: AI giants including Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, and Oracle recently announced a $40 billion deal that will help them secure coveted computing capacity for artificial intelligence.

items.title: Amazon’s AWS Outage Exposes Major Vulnerability In Ethereum NFTs
items.description: AWS outage exposed Ethereum NFT centralization, questioning real ownership and driving users toward Bitcoin Ordinals.

items.title: Amazon Cloud Crash Sends Shockwaves Through Global Web--Investors Eye Rising Systemic Risk
items.description: AWS outage disrupts major banks, apps, and media platforms, reigniting calls to diversify digital infrastructure
